name: wechat-md-studio
description: Free, local-first Markdown formatter for WeChat Official Account articles with smart theme recommendations.

scripts.smoke: node ./bin/wechat-md-studio.js recommend examples/ai-money.md --json && node ./bin/wechat-md-studio.js format examples/ai-money.md --out dist/ai-money.html && node ./bin/wechat-md-studio.js preview examples/science.md --out dist/science.preview.html
